query:
SELECT bookTitle, coverImageUrl, s3CoverUrl
FROM book_profiles
WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%7 Powers%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Abundance%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Active Listen%'
ORDER BY bookTitle;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT bookTitle, coverImageUrl, s3CoverUrl
FROM book_profiles
WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%7 Powers%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Abundance%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Active Listen%'
ORDER BY bookTitle;

rows.bookTitle: 7 Powers_ The Foundations of Business Strategy
